browser_path_prompt: (RECOMMENDED) Press enter in order to use the default browser path (If you have Chrome installed)
browser_path_info:
If you prefer to use other Chromium browser other than Chrome, please enter its executable path here.
(e.g: C:\Program Files\Google\Chrome\Application\chrome.exe)
supported_browsers: Here are some supported browsers that are tested and able to use:
password_prompt: (RECOMMENDED) Press enter in order to use the default password
password_info:
If you prefer to use your own password, do make sure that your password fulfill the below requirements:
- Use at least 8 characters
- Use a lowercase letter
- Use an uppercase letter
- Use at least 1 special character (!@#$%...)
- Use at least 1 number
random_password_generated:
Random password generated: {passw}
You can also find it in accounts.txt
proxy_prompt: Would you like to use a proxy?
proxy_info: Please enter the proxy IP and port in the format of IP:PORT (Example: http://localhost:1080). Press enter to skip.
password_not_meeting_requirements: Password does not meet the required criteria. Please try again.
failed_load_registration_page: Failed to load the registration page.
use_last_config_prompt: Would you like to use the last configuration?
